title: Simultandolmetschen III (DE>EN) Gruppe 1
organisation: The Institute for Translation and Interpreting
further_info: Recommended Reading Christoph Stoll (2008): Translation in Transition. The Heidelberg Model of Interpreting. Trier: WVT Wissenschaftlicher Verlag Trier. Andrew Gillies (2013): Conference Interpreting. A Student's Practice Book. Routledge. James Nolan (2014): Interpretation Techniques and Exercises. Cleveland Buffalo Toronto: Multilingual Matters. Setton, Robin (1999): Simultaneous Interpretation. A Cognitive-pragmatic analysis. Amsterdam/Philadelphia: John Benjamins Publishing Company. Gile, Daniel (1995), Basic concepts and models for translator and interpreter training, Amsterdam/Philadelphia: John Benjamins Publishing Company.
